2.  **Define Bounding Boxes:** I need to estimate the coordinates [ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax] for each text element. The image size is roughly 1000x1400 based on typical aspect ratios, but I will work with relative coordinates normalized to 1000x1000 for consistency if needed, or just raw pixel values if I had them.
